manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v58

Wow, a week full of updates!

- Enabled haptic feedback when swiping through tabs on Instagram.
- Added holding for 2x speed for reels in the normal feed, carousel photos with music attached to them, as well as carousel videos.
- Redesigned the Recent searches in Explore.
- Added a reel and carousel icon in the videos and carousel posts showed in Explore after searching something.
- Added a button to quickly switch accounts through the Notifications tab.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
